profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Globe Kita Terang Tbk engages in the retail and distribution of cellular phones and accessories in Indonesia. It offers starter packs and top-up vouchers; produces coffee beans; and distributes coffee machines. The company also provides complementary products for cellular phones, including physical and electronic simcards and vouchers. It sells its products through online and offline stores. The company was formerly known as PT Global Teleshop Tbk and changed its name to PT Globe Kita Terang Tbk in June 2021. PT Globe Kita Terang Tbk was founded in 2007 and is based in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia. The company operates as a subsidiary of PT Trikomsel Oke Tbk.
